title: Fix Radix Select crash and preserve comic + Aaron appearance

requirements.text: Eliminate the runtime crash caused by any Radix/Shadcn `<SelectItem />` using an empty-string `value` by auditing all Select components and replacing `value=""` with a non-empty sentinel value, while preserving the user-visible meaning of “Default/None” selections.

quotes: IT CRASHED, A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string.
Fix the app and then make sure that the problems are gone

acceptanceCriteria: App no longer crashes on load with the Radix error: "A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string".
In `frontend/src/components/StoryNarrationControl.tsx`, the three voice dropdowns no longer render any `<SelectItem value="">…</SelectItem>` option.
Choosing the UI option that represents the default voice still results in using the default voice behavior (i.e., the app does not force a specific selected voice).

requirements.text: Ensure the existing comic content remains present and functional after applying the crash fix, including comic panel rendering and the characters gallery.

quotes: make sure that the problems are gone but the comic is still there

acceptanceCriteria: The `ComicViewer` still renders comic panels (not a blank/black screen) and remains usable after the Select crash fix.
The `CharactersGallery` still renders all existing characters, including Aaron, after the Select crash fix.
No changes remove or significantly alter the existing chapter/panel data in `frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts` beyond what is required for stability fixes.

requirements.text: Update the character Aaron (user spelled “Arron”) to appear as a Black character with a bit of hair by updating the Aaron character artwork asset and keeping the gallery wired to the updated asset.

quotes: Arron has a bit hair and is black

acceptanceCriteria: The Characters Gallery displays Aaron with dark skin and short/visible hair in the character tile artwork.
Aaron’s character entry in `frontend/src/lib/characters.ts` references the updated artwork filename (or the original filename if overwritten) and remains correctly displayed.
All user-facing text remains in English for this change (e.g., alt text updates remain English).

constraints: Do not edit files under `frontend/src/components/ui` (compose them only).
Respect the single-actor backend architecture; only add a migration if persistent state schema changes (not expected for this fix).
nonGoals: Adding new authentication providers beyond Internet Identity.
Adding new comic chapters, new story content, or changing the story order beyond what is necessary to keep existing content rendering.
Introducing external databases or non-supported backend technologies.

edits: Adjust Aaron character portrait to depict dark skin and short/visible hair in bold comic/halftone style (character-aaron.dim_768x768.png > character-aaron-v2.dim_768x768.png)
